overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a white-haired character exploring a medieval harbor village at night. The character holds a torch and walks from a wooden dock through narrow village streets and market stalls under a large crescent moon. The scene features historic stone architecture with warm light emanating from windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden harbor dock with moored boats

events.description: torch becomes clearly visible, casting warm orange light on surroundings
moving from open dock into village area with buildings ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock holding a lit torch

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the harbor walkway
small wooden fishing boat moored at the dock
wooden posts supporting the dock structure
large crescent moon in dark blue night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark harbor dock at night. The character walks forward holding a torch, illuminating the wooden planks and a moored boat to the right. The large moon hangs in the sky ahead as the character moves from the open dock toward the village buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village square with stone and timber buildings

events.description: entering the main village area from the harbor dock
passing by buildings with warm lit windows on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking through the village center, torchlight flickering on building facades

entered.detail: two-story stone building with lit windows
dark wooden structure with glowing windows
dirt and cobblestone street through the settlement

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the harbor into a medieval village square. Stone and timber buildings with warm lit windows line the path. The torch illuminates the dirt street as the character progresses deeper into the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village alley with market stalls

events.description: entering narrower passage between high stone walls
market stalls with canvas awnings appear on the right side

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow alley, passing close to stone walls

entered.detail: wooden merchant stall with canvas awning

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into an enclosed alley with stone walls on the left and market stalls on the right. The character walks past a merchant stall with a canvas awning, the torchlight casting dancing shadows on the rough stone surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated village path with stone steps

events.description: character begins ascending worn stone steps
reaching top of steps, view opens to elevated market area

agents.ego_description: climbing stone steps while holding the torch, moving to elevated section of village

entered.detail: low stone wall along the path

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a set of worn stone steps leading to an elevated section of the village. Market canopies line the right side while a stone railing runs along the left. The torch illuminates the rough texture of the steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path leading to stone gate archway

events.description: large stone archway becomes visible ahead against the night sky
approaching the imposing stone gate structure at village edge

agents.ego_description: walking toward the stone archway at the edge of the village

entered.detail: large stone archway marking village entrance
simple wooden fence along the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a cobblestone path toward a large stone archway. The moon is visible above the gate structure. Wooden fences line the left side of the path as the character approaches the village exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, open harbor dock into the heart of a medieval village and out toward a stone gateway. It begins on wooden planks beside a moored boat, with the character's torch illuminating the path under a large crescent moon. As the character moves inland, the open dock gives way to a village square lined with stone and timber buildings featuring warm, glowing windows. The scene then narrows into an enclosed alleyway of rough stone walls and canvas market stalls before ascending a set of worn stone steps toward an elevated district. Finally, the path opens onto a cobblestone walkway flanked by wooden fences, leading the character toward a large stone archway beneath the moonlit sky.
